rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 15, 2011, line 2. rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Deft Kaiser Foundation Hospital'S Mo To Compel Further Responses To Defts' Standard Interrogatories To Pltf, Set Two And For A Protective Order Staying Pltfs' Depositions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 15, 2011, line 2. Defendant Union Carbide¿s joinder in Kaiser Foundation Hospitals¿ motion to compel further response to standard interrogatories to plaintiff, set two, for protective order staying plaintiffs¿ depositions, and for monetary sanctions will be heard at 9:15am in Department 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. Although the underlying motion has been taken off calendar, the court is considering it based on the joinders. Kaiser¿s motion to compel and for protective order are denied. Kaiser failed to meet and confer with plaintiff regarding plaintiff¿s supplemental responses to standard interrogatories, which were served prior to Kaiser filing this motion. C.C.P. 2016.040. Both parties¿ requests for sanctions are denied. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Union Carbide Corporations Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Staying The Taking Of The Deposition Of Plaintiffs George Patterson And Sherley Patterson Until Such Time As Outstanding Medical, Employment, Nprc Military And Social Security Records Are Received
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 15, 2011, line 2. Defendant Union Carbide¿s motion for protective order staying the taking of the deposition of plaintiffs George Patterson and Sherley Patterson until such a time as outstanding medical, employment, NPRC military and social security records are received will be heard at 9:15am in Department 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. Defendant¿s motion is granted. Plaintiffs¿ depositions are stayed until the records at issue are received. Plaintiffs¿ opposition was filed late and plaintiffs did not demonstrate good cause why it was filed late. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs' Interrogatories From Defendant Ric-Wil, Incorporated
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 15, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiff¿s interrogatories from defendant Ric-Wil, Inc. is denied. Anvil Industries, Inc., parent company of Ric-Wil, Inc, served responses in February 2000 that include information regarding Ric-Wil, Inc.. Plaintiff¿s request for sanctions is denied. = (220/HEK)
